title: Better Mod Button
description: [No Longer Needed] Fixes Mod Menu's placement of the Mod Button
body:
**The 1.16.2 version also works for 1.16.3-1.16.5!**
**Starting with ModMenu 1.15.0, this mod is obsolete, and will crash if you try to load it.** **To get this style, go into ModMenu's settings and change Button Style to Adjacent** [test](https://google.com)
Fixes the location of ModMenu's Mod Button. Since this moves ModMenu's Button, then ModMenu is required.
![main menu](https://i.imgur.com/MSlZj3D.png) Title Screen: - The Realms Button has been shorten and the Mods Button has been moved next to it - The amount of mods loaded has been moved from the button to above the version ![pause menu](https://i.imgur.com/sjZGIsc.png) Game Menu / Pause Screen: - The Report Bugs Button has been replaced with the Mods Button. If you still want to report a bug, click on Give Feedback and hit the Report Bugs Button - The amount of mods loaded has been moved from the button to the bottom left

Test
